allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "import sqlite3;c=sqlite3.connect\('data/market.db'\);p=lambda q:c.execute\(q\).fetchone\(\)[0];print\('games',p\('select count\(*\) from games'\)\);print\('snapshots',p\('select count\(*\) from listing_snapshots'\)\);print\('review_history',p\('select count\(*\) from review_history'\)\);print\('igdb_genres',p\(\\"select count\(*\) from game_genres where source='igdb-genre'\\"\)\)")
